text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. ♪ Where should I hide? I'd<n>better hurry
if I don't want to get found!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to take advantage of my large<n>size to hide
in a way that only I can. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should climb somewhere high<n>up. Or...
maybe I can blend in with the<n>Three Goddess
statues?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I'll dress up as a tree! As long as I<n>stay still,
maybe no one will find me!
